bonusTrigger.name: hold_and_win_trigger
bonusTrigger.rule: trigger when Bonus Coin appears on reels 1 and 3 and Chicken or Super Chicken lands on reel 2

collectRules.rule: Chicken Coin triggers collect in both modes; Super Chicken also triggers collect and gathers Chicken values in Bonus Game

boostRules.name: chicken_boost_feature
boostRules.rule: Super Chicken can apply multiplier boost, attach jackpot, or add extra bonus coins

jackpotTriggerLogic.rule: jackpots can attach in base or bonus mode through Super Chicken boost and occasional bonus coin jackpot outcome

unresolvedItems: Certified reel-strip frequency, symbol-value distribution, and jackpot weighting remain unresolved and are still provisional.
Exact donor RTP/volatility targets and certified hold-and-win state machine constants are still pending backend/certified math.
